title: Academic Years
deleteConfirm: Delete the academic year "{{ name }}"? This cannot be undone.
lockedHint: This year is locked and can't be edited or deleted.
startedHint: This year has already started and can't be edited or deleted.
empty: No academic years yet. Use the New button to create one.

setup.title: Cycle, terms, and pastoral structure
setup.description: Set the timetable cycle, school week shape, and term dates. Optionally copy the pastoral structure from an existing year.
setup.daysPerWeekHint: How many days a week the school is open (e.g. 5 for Mon-Fri).
setup.termsHint: Add at least one term. The academic year's name is derived from the term dates.
setup.noTerms: No terms yet. Click Add Term to begin.
setup.pastoralHint: Optionally seed the new year's year groups, reg groups, and houses from a previous year.

periods.title: Attendance Periods
periods.description: Define when each day's periods start and end, and which ones are AM/PM reg or lessons. You can copy this from an existing year if the timetable hasn't changed. Every cycle day needs exactly one AM and one PM reg period; lessons are optional.
periods.amPmRule: Each cycle day must have exactly one AM reg and one PM reg period:
periods.noPriorYears: No previous years available to copy from.
periods.copyConfirm: This will replace periods on {{ count }} other day(s) with copies of the current day's periods. Continue?
periods.noPeriods: No periods for this day yet. Click Add Period to begin.

holidays.title: Holidays
holidays.description: Add half-term breaks, public holidays, and teacher-training days. These are excluded from the timetable.
holidays.noHolidays: No holidays yet. Add half-terms, public holidays, or teacher-training days here.

review.title: Review
review.description: Check the summary below, then create the academic year.
review.rolesSummary: {{ am }} AM · {{ pm }} PM · {{ lessons }} lesson(s)
review.pastoralNone: Starting fresh — no pastoral structure copied.
